title: Prosper Shield GHL Live Map

safety.publicDataPolicy: Token values, passwords, bearer strings, webhook URLs, and credential material are intentionally not present. Use credential ref names and validation status only.

aiIngestion.recommendedInstruction: Attach or paste ai-context.md first, then use data/ghl-live-map.json as the source of truth for counts, routes, connector statuses, and setup guidance.
aiIngestion.safeAnswerPattern: Answer with the system, current status, supporting JSON path or report section, risk, and next non-destructive setup step. Do not invent secret values.

sections.title: GHL Subaccounts
sections.description: Subaccount names, IDs, last login, active/stale/dormant status, lead counts, opportunity counts, visible phone, and phone risk status.

sections.title: Credential Systems
sections.description: One row per connector system with credential refs, connector purpose, live auth status, and login notes.

sections.title: Connector Routes
sections.description: How systems connect to each other: GHL, Make, n8n, Telnyx, Supabase, GitHub, Netlify, Cloudflare, Monday, Gemini, Redis, 1Password, Setmore, SignNow.

sections.title: Credential Ref Detail
sections.description: One row per credential ref with system, kind, set state, validation, public handling, role, and route. Values are redacted.

sections.title: n8n Workflows
sections.description: n8n workflow names, active state, update time, node count, webhook paths, and integrations.

sections.title: Make.com
sections.description: Make scenarios, webhooks, and connections used for GHL/Monday/install/quote/publish flows.

sections.title: Telnyx
sections.description: Telnyx phone numbers, messaging profiles, voice/SIP connections, FQDNs, and outbound voice profiles.

actionItems.title: A2P incomplete or failed
actionItems.detail: Andrew Brown, Daniel Tirri, Jeff Restel, and Scott show incomplete/failed A2P 10DLC in the GHL phone system.

actionItems.title: Needs phone configuration
actionItems.detail: Cole Stallard, Garett Eackelbary, Junnie, and Sandbox require phone-system configuration from the GHL phone screens.

actionItems.title: No Data despite LC Phone card
actionItems.detail: Danny and Nelson Mousques have LC Phone managed indicators but the Phone System page rendered No Data.

actionItems.title: Outbound send freeze
actionItems.detail: Prosper policy/memory says no customer sends, SMS fallback, or public social blast should be fired without Craig's explicit go.

actionItems.title: Setmore: needs-reauth
actionItems.detail: SETMORE_API_KEY is present but the tested services endpoint returned HTTP 401.

actionItems.title: Assistable / Voice AI: present-not-tested
actionItems.detail: Assistable refs exist and connect to voice/AI call paths through Telnyx/n8n.

actionItems.title: Other Prosper AI/vendor keys: present-not-tested
actionItems.detail: Refs are present in the Prosper env registry. They are not core to the GHL live map and were not exercised in this run.

actionItems.title: HighLevel API scope
actionItems.detail: PROSPER MAIN is readable deeply by API; non-main subaccounts rely on browser inventory for full detail until agency scope is repaired.

queryExamples: Show all GHL credential refs and what they route into.
Which phone numbers are tied to Telnyx Reactivation Engine?
What is safe to publish and what is redacted?
